_meta.keyKnowledge: We analyse and visualise data interactively using spreadsheets, relational databases and other software to draw conclusions and make recommendations.

_source.w: We analyse and visualise data interactively using spreadsheets, relational databases and other software to draw conclusions and make recommendations.
y: Interactive data analysis and visualisation enables deeper exploration and more nuanced insights.
The ability to draw evidence-based conclusions from data is one of the most valued professional skills.
Relational database skills open doors to careers in data science, business analysis and technology.
eg: We create interactive dashboards that allow users to explore data from multiple perspectives.
We use relational database queries (SQL) to extract, filter and aggregate data for analysis.
We apply statistical techniques to identify significant patterns and relationships in data.
We create compelling data visualisations that communicate complex findings clearly.
We draw evidence-based conclusions and present actionable recommendations.
We evaluate the limitations and potential biases in our data and analysis methods.
